nodes.label: Zero-Intrusion Telemetry Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Decorator-based instrumentation of 43 MCP tools with zero code changes to core.py. wrap() replaces public functions via globals() at module load, activated by NOVEL_TELEMETRY=1 env var. Records duration, LLM tokens, decisions per tool call. Auto-saves per-chapter reports on write_extraction.

nodes.label: Three-Layer Character Name Filtering
nodes.rationale: Layer 1a: tightened dialogue tag regex (only pure dialogue verbs like 说/道/问/喊). Layer 1b: subject-action extraction from non-dialogue context. Layer 2: hard exclusion patterns (X声 adverbs, X着 continuous markers, X了X verb reduplication, direction actions, scene nouns, sensory words). Layer 3: context verification — candidates appearing only in dialogue tags are silently skipped as likely adverb false positives. Prevents tokenizer false positives that plagued earlier versions.

nodes.label: Three-Step Outline Compliance Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Step 1: bigram overlap matching for key_events/threads_to_plant/threads_to_resolve (fast, deterministic). Step 2: LLM semantic equivalence check for bigram misses (catches synonyms like 深夜来访=突然出现). Step 3: purpose-level alignment check independent of key_events format. Violations tagged as pending_semantic severity, resolved by core.py calling _semantic_compliance_check(). V20: retroactively detected 19/50 deviated chapters in V17 with zero false positives.

nodes.label: Homogeneity Prevention via ending_type
nodes.rationale: V26 two-layer anti-homogeneity: Layer 1 — derivation prompt injects recent N chapters' purpose/ending as 'avoid' constraints. Layer 2 — ChapterArc ending_type field (cliffhanger/revelation/quiet/reversal/open/daily), with high-severity warning when same type appears consecutively. analyze_pacing upgraded to detect ending_type repetition with bigram fallback. V26: 6 chapters used all 6 types with zero repetition.

nodes.label: Prompt Soft-Decoupling (V12 Constraint Separation)
nodes.rationale: Moved 50+ hard-coded '必须/禁止' constraints from prompts into validators.py post-hoc checks. 12 prompt labels softened to descriptive. Four validators (character names/structure/style/length) with auto-fix + retry pipeline integration. End-to-end validation: softened prompts did not degrade LLM output quality.

nodes.label: Purpose Alignment SHA256 Cache
nodes.rationale: V22: purpose alignment results cached using SHA256 hash of (purpose + event titles/details). Four invalidation points: write_extraction, accept_edit, revise_outline, clear_chapter_data. Avoids redundant LLM calls when purpose and events unchanged between runs.

nodes.label: Auto-Registration of Undeclared Locations
nodes.rationale: V21: write_extraction automatically registers locations referenced in event_relations but not declared in new_locations. Uses type=auto_registered to distinguish from explicitly declared locations. Deduplicates against existing locations and explicitly declared new_locations. Eliminated missing-location consistency errors in large-scale runs.

nodes.label: Edit Version Management (Snapshot/Rollback)
nodes.rationale: V21-V22: Auto-snapshots created before accept_edit with microsecond timestamps to prevent collisions. list_edits shows history by chapter. rollback_edit restores a snapshot and auto-snapshots current state for re-rollback. V22 added needs_revision cleanup on rollback and clear_revision_marks parameter to control downstream outline behavior.

nodes.label: Parallel Chapter Generation (V23)
nodes.rationale: Four MCP tools: analyze_parallel_groups (literal adjacency dependency analysis + topological sort), prepare_parallel_batch (full-graph snapshot + frozen context), get_parallel_writing_prompt (arc ending anchors replace prev_text when predecessor is in same batch), merge_parallel_results (serial merge + conflict detection). Pipeline functionally correct but shelved due to narrative consistency issues — parallel agents independently assert different settings.

nodes.label: Forbidden Patterns (Regex-Based Style Enforcement)
nodes.rationale: V18-R2: Configuration-driven forbidden pattern validation via regex. Prompts proved ineffective at eliminating patterns like 不是X是Y (46→13 in V18-R1) but config-based validator achieved 13→0. Patterns configured in project.yaml under validation.forbidden_patterns with max_per_chapter limits, checked at error severity by validate_forbidden_patterns().

nodes.label: Wall Clock Telemetry Injection
nodes.rationale: V25: set_telemetry_wall_clock() is called by the main session after a sub-agent returns, injecting the sub-agent's end-to-end wall clock time (including LLM calls). Separates MCP tool duration (measured by wrap decorator) from total sub-agent wall time. Enables render_telemetry dashboard to show MCP vs wall clock comparison charts.
